_meta.description: 60-second horizontal brand film. Two-act narrative structure with atmosphere bookends. Slow, confident editorial pacing — cuts every 4–6s. Music enters on Act 1 transition. For screenings, presentations, and YouTube.

sections.name: Atmosphere
sections.notes: Silent open. Room tone or ambient only — no music yet. Establishes world and tone. Single or two very slow cuts.

sections.name: Chapter-1
sections.notes: Act 1 — The world or the people. Documentary or observational register. 3–4 shots. No music pressure yet.

sections.name: Music entry
sections.notes: Music enters here — fade in over 2s. Pivotal moment: a look, a gesture, a product close. The film lifts.

sections.name: Chapter-2
sections.notes: Act 2 — The craft, the vision, the brand belief. More dynamic rhythm. Music fully established.

sections.name: Statement
sections.notes: Brand statement or manifesto line on screen. Minimal clip motion. Music reaches emotional peak or quiet resolve.

sections.name: End card
sections.notes: Logo on black. Music fades on last beat. 1s silence before true end.

clips.notes: Muted — room tone or near-silence only. Slow pan or completely still. Sets place and time.
Wide shot. The world the brand inhabits. Observational.
Craft, process, or making — hands at work or material being transformed.
A face or figure — the human heart of the brand. Natural light preferred.
Intimate detail shot. Surfaces, materials, the physical reality of the brand.
The pivot moment — a look to camera, a product placed, a door opened. Music fades in here over 2s.
Act 2 opens on a wider, grander frame. The brand's aspiration made visible.
Product hero shot. Elegant, deliberate. The object the brand makes.
Person and product in harmony. The brand belief embodied.
Emotional close — expression, gesture, or detail that carries feeling.
Very slow or still clip. The brand statement will overlay this. Neutral tones preferred.
Pure black or deep brand color. Logo appears here. Music fades.

music.notes: Music enters at second 25 (Music entry section). Fade in over 2s. Duck under any VO. Fade out over end card.

text_overlays.text: PLACEHOLDER: Brand statement or manifesto line
